scripts.build:ordered: bun run --filter 'acp-core' build && bun run --filter 'coordination-substrate' build && bun run --filter 'wrkq-lib' build && bun run --filter 'acp-admin-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-conversation' build && bun run --filter 'acp-interface-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-jobs-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-state-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-ops-projection' build && bun run --filter 'acp-ops-reducer' build && bun run --filter 'gateway-discord' build && bun run --filter 'gateway-ios' build && bun run --filter 'acp-server' build && bun run --filter 'acp-cli' build && bun run --filter 'wlearn' build && bun run --filter 'acp-viewer' build && bun run --filter 'acp-ops-web' build && bun run --filter 'acp-e2e' build
scripts.test: bash -lc 'bun test tests/conformance/acp-workflow && for pkg in "acp-core" "coordination-substrate" "wrkq-lib" "acp-admin-store" "acp-conversation" "acp-interface-store" "acp-jobs-store" "acp-state-store" "acp-ops-projection" "acp-ops-reducer" "gateway-discord" "gateway-ios" "acp-server" "acp-cli" "wlearn" "acp-viewer" "acp-e2e"; do bun run --filter "$pkg" test || exit $?; done'
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun run build
